tagline: Cloud & Data Engineer building ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications on AWS and Azure.
description: Cloud & Data Engineer with 3+ years delivering cloud-native ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications. MS Data Science @ University at Buffalo.

roles.detailed: Cloud & Data Engineer | Python, SQL, AWS, PySpark, Kafka | Open to Summer 2026 & Full-Time Roles

bio: Cloud & Data Engineer with 3+ years delivering cloud-native ETL pipelines, streaming systems, and AI-integrated applications on AWS and Azure. Achieved 40% throughput gains, 65% faster batch runtimes, and 99.8% uptime. Currently contributing to deepfake detection research under Prof. Siwei Lyu (IEEE Fellow, Director — UB Institute for AI & Data Science). Experienced with Python, SQL, PySpark, Kafka, Airflow, AWS, Azure, Snowflake, Flask, FastAPI, Docker, Tableau, and Power BI. Open to Data Engineering, Data Science, and Software Engineering roles.

experience.role: Graduate Research Assistant — AI & Data Systems
experience.company: University at Buffalo · UB Media Forensic Lab
bullets: Architected Python ETL pipelines loading 50K+ multi-modal records into AWS S3; slashing preprocessing errors by 45% for Deep-O-Meter.
Engineered PySpark workflows on 100GB+ datasets; halved computation time by 60% via adaptive partitioning and broadcast joins.
Designed ML feature pipelines (PCA, SMOTE, normalization) for 5+ deepfake models; lifting F1-score by 12%.
Built Flask REST APIs for live ML inference; drove API latency 580ms → 378ms, raising throughput by 28%.
Established MLflow model versioning and data lineage across 10+ configs; paring QA effort by 30%.
experience.desc: Research under Prof. Siwei Lyu, IEEE Fellow, Director — UB Institute for AI & Data Science.

bullets: Automated AWS S3 + SFTP ingestion processing 200+ files daily; boosted throughput by 40% and eliminated 15 hrs/week manual reconciliation.
Integrated Sterling File Gateway with 5+ enterprise systems; enforced SOX-compliant data lineage, lowering cross-system errors by 35%.
Built SLA observability (CloudWatch + PagerDuty) for 12+ pipelines, sustaining 99.8% uptime; trimmed incident resolution by 25%.
Refactored 20+ SQL queries to CTEs and window functions; restructured 4 schemas, shrinking query latency by 30%.
Instituted CI/CD test suites across 15+ workflows, cutting post-deployment defects by 40%.
experience.desc: Enterprise cloud data engineering with SOX-compliant pipelines and production observability.

bullets: Productionized Python ingestion pipelines processing 500K+ records from 10+ sources; reduced execution time by 45%.
Restructured relational schemas with composite indexing, achieving 60% faster queries across 8 datasets for 3 enterprise clients.
Shipped 15+ Tableau and Power BI dashboards saving clients 6+ hrs/week in manual reporting.
Maintained data workflows with validation and exception handling, sustaining 99.5% accuracy over 2M+ records.
experience.desc: End-to-end analytics and Python development for enterprise clients.
